data_description.api_key: API account key for LTA DataMall API.
data_description.scan_interval: The frequency to fetch data from the LTA DataMall API. Minimum is 30 seconds.

user.description: To get your API account key, you will need to [request for LTA DataMall access](https://datamall.lta.gov.sg/content/datamall/en/request-for-api.html).
